# llmstxt.codes

> AI Readiness Scanner — check if your website is ready for AI crawlers and language models.

## Tools

- [Scanner](https://llmstxt.codes/): Scan any domain for AI readiness
- [Playground](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/playground): Validate llms.txt files in real-time
- [llms.txt Generator](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/generator/llms-txt): Generate an llms.txt file
- [robots.txt Generator](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/generator/robots-txt): Configure AI crawler access
- [ai.txt Generator](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/generator/ai-txt): Declare AI usage policies

## Learn

- [What is llms.txt?](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/llms-txt): The AI README standard for websites
- [robots.txt and AI](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/robots-txt): Control AI crawler access
- [What is ai.txt?](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/ai-txt): AI usage policy declarations
- [Sitemaps and AI](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/sitemap): Help AI crawlers discover your content

## About

- [About](https://llmstxt.codes/about): How scoring works, what we check, and the API
